validation: Review used only local repository files, local command output, and the issue text embedded in docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-141/04_review.prompt.md.
Inspected current working-tree diff for README.md, docs/contributor/api-reference.md, and docs/usage/cli_proofbundle_verifier_alpha.md.
Inspected untracked docs/changes/v1.7.x.md and local issue-141 evidence files under docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-141/.
Confirmed the diff is documentation-only and does not edit release workflows, gate policy, package metadata, publishing scripts, tag logic, or tests.

Confirmed the new v1.7.1 docs preserve the verifier boundary: attestplane verify remains chain/report-oriented by default, with --require-non-empty and --strict-schema described as opt-in flags and not as full signature, anchor, network, or compliance verification.

Checked local dependency evidence for Issues #137, #138, and #139: canonicalization vectors, CLI verify flags, and signed-schema round-trip regression are recorded in local validation files and referenced by the new docs page.
Reviewed local gate evidence: docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-141/gate_report.json reports PASS for type:docs with python -m compileall scripts exit_code 0.

Reviewed additional local validation evidence in docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-141/test.md: markdownlint-cli2 passed on the touched docs, snippet smoke tests passed, dependency pytest selectors passed, git diff --check passed, and run_gate Projects/attestplane reported PASS.
Ran git diff --check during review; it produced no whitespace errors.

Ran a local red-line keyword scan over touched docs and issue-141 evidence; matches were existing disclaimers or explicit no-publish/no-tag safety notes, not changed publish/tag behavior or leaked credentials.
residual_risks: The review did not fetch the GitHub issue or any external source; it relied on the issue text supplied in the prompt and local repository evidence as required.
The issue-required markdownlint command name was unavailable locally, but the recorded local equivalent markdownlint-cli2 command passed.
The docs doctest command recorded in local evidence collected no tests under the local harness; the SDK and CLI snippets were instead smoke-tested manually with local commands.
Because this is a docs-only extension that summarizes Issues #137, #138, and #139, the accuracy of the new page depends on those local evidence files remaining aligned with the product changes.
